//: Railway env (required in production): NODE_ENV=production | PORT (auto) | SUPABASE_URL | SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY | RAZORPAY_KEY_ID | RAZORPAY_KEY_SECRET | RAZORPAY_WEBHOOK_SECRET | CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS (comma-separated app origins). Optional: EXPO_ACCESS_TOKEN (push), EMAIL_PROVIDER+RESEND_API_KEY or SMTP_*, RAZORPAYX_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, RAZORPAYX_FUND_ACCOUNT_ID, RAZORPAYX_WEBHOOK_SECRET, RAZORPAYX_PAYOUT_MODE
name: natures-grace-api
description: Standalone Express API for Nature's Grace (Railway). Set env vars in the Railway dashboard — see the // field above.
